_comment: DEMO/TEST feed: version label is bumped so an installed 26.1.0-rc.1 sees an update and can exercise Download & Install. Assets are the REAL signed 26.1.0-rc.1 installers (macOS notarized, Windows Tech2Win-signed; sha256 match). Set version to the true build when a real newer RC is published, or revert to 26.1.0-rc.1 to show 'up to date'.
